name: New Member Welcome
description: Kick off the year by meeting fellow HKSA members, learning about what we do, and finding your community at Stanford.

name: Open Quarter Rice
description: A shared meal at the start of each quarter to welcome new faces, reconnect with old friends, and begin the term together as a community.

name: Food & Gather
description: Casual on-campus hangouts with Hong Kong food, mahjong, karaoke, and plenty of time to catch up with friends.

name: Mahjong Night
description: More than just a game, mahjong has long been a staple of social life in Hong Kong. Join us for an evening of strategy, laughter, and friendly competition.

name: Karaoke Night
description: From Cantopop classics to the latest hits, gather for a night of music, laughter, and singing with friends.

name: Movie Night
description: Enjoy Cantonese films with fellow members and discover the stories, humor, and nostalgia that resonate with generations of Hongkongers.

name: Winter Solstice
description: Celebrated widely in Hong Kong, the Winter Solstice is a time for reunion and togetherness. Join us as we mark the occasion with food and community.

name: Chinese New Year
description: Celebrate the start of the new year with fai chun calligraphy, festive treats, and traditional customs as we share one of Hong Kong's most cherished celebrations.

name: Chinese New Year Hotpot
description: Gather around the hotpot table to celebrate the beginning of a new year with students and alumni, sharing good food and good company.

name: Dim Sum Run
description: Explore some of the Bay Area's best dim sum restaurants and experience one of Hong Kong's most beloved dining traditions.

name: Hongkongers in the Bay Area
description: Connect with Hong Kong professionals and alumni across a range of industries, fostering mentorship and cultural connections across generations.

name: Berkeley Mixer
description: Strengthen ties with fellow Hong Kong students across the Bay Area and celebrate our shared culture.

name: Spring Retreat
description: An off-campus getaway to relax, explore, and create lasting memories as we celebrate another year together.

name: Year-End Celebration
description: Close out the academic year with hotpot, karaoke, and a chance to celebrate our graduating members and reconnect with alumni.
